What We Do

Roofing Services in Leicestershire & Derbyshire

From emergency repairs to full re-roofs and scaffold erection, we cover every aspect of roofing and access solutions.

01

Pitched Roofs

Full re-roofs and repairs in slate, clay, and concrete tiles. Strip and replace or patch repairs — all work backed by a 10-year guarantee on new roofs.
02

Flat Roofing

Torch-on felt and rubber (EPDM) flat roof systems for extensions, garages, and commercial buildings. Long-life solutions installed to manufacturer spec.
03

Chimney & Lead Work

Chimney removal, repointing, and rebuilds. Lead flashing, wet gables, and all associated leadwork carried out to a high standard from scaffold.
04

Soffit, Fascia & Guttering

UPVC soffit, fascia, and guttering supply and fit. Replacement or repair of existing systems to keep water clear of your property.
05

Dry Verge & Ridge

Dry verge, dry ridge, and dry valley systems. Maintenance-free alternatives to mortar — secure, weathertight, and long-lasting.
06

Scaffolding

Safe working scaffold erected for all roofing projects. CSCS-accredited operatives — no work starts at height without the correct access in place.
Before & After

See The Difference

Real jobs, real results — watch recent A2B projects come together from start to finish.

Recent Project

New Dormer Build

A new dormer built into an existing slate roof — timber-framed, insulated, and made weathertight with matching slate and lead flashing. Watch it take shape from first cut to a clean, finished result.

  • Timber-framed & fully insulated
  • Matching slate with lead flashing & soakers
  • Backed by our 10-year workmanship guarantee
Get a Free Quote
Recent Project

Mock-Tudor Gable Restoration

A weathered mock-Tudor gable apex brought back to life — the tired timber boards renewed, the render between them refreshed, and the whole feature finished in a crisp black-and-white that lifts the entire frontage.

  • Tired timber apex boards renewed & repainted
  • Render panels cleaned up & refreshed
  • Sharp black-and-white period finish
Get a Free Quote

Why Choose A2B

Why Homeowners Choose Us

"I started A2B in 2020 and the blood, sweat and tears that have gone into building our reputation is one of my proudest moments." — Andrew Laxton, Owner

£100k Public Liability
Fully insured with £100,000 public liability. You're covered on every job, residential or commercial.
72 Facebook Reviews
4.5-star average across 72 real customer reviews. Our reputation is built job by job, not by marketing.
10-Year Guarantee
All new roof installations come with a 10-year workmanship guarantee. We stand behind every job we complete.
Fast Response
Emergency call-outs available. If you have a leak or storm damage, we move fast — roof problems don't wait.
CSCS Accredited
CSCS card holders. Trained, experienced operatives — no subcontracting, no cutting corners on your roof.
Free Quotations
No-obligation, written quotes at no charge. We survey the job properly and price it fairly — no hidden costs.

About Us

Your Local Roofing Specialist

At A2B Roofing and Scaffolding we aim to give every customer the best value for money and the longest lasting roofs. We use high-end materials on every job — and our 72 five-star reviews speak for themselves.

"I'm Andrew Laxton, owner of A2B. I started the business in 2020 and the blood, sweat and tears that have gone into building our reputation is one of my proudest moments. To hear customers genuinely appreciate your hard work makes it all worthwhile."

£100k Public Liability Insurance
Fully insured with £100,000 public liability. All work meets current building regulations and manufacturer specs.
Fast Response Times
We understand that roof problems can't wait. Emergency call-outs available 24 hours a day.
10-Year Guarantee on New Roofs
We back our work with a 10-year guarantee on all new roof installations. Quality materials, quality workmanship.
